title: Paimon Food:Reborn
body:
Paimon Food: Reborn is a 1.12.2 unofficial remake version of PaiMon Food Mod.

Based on the original mod, a number of weapons, food and achievements have been added.

This is a food mod about "Paimon" which is a meme from Genshin.

You can eat (eat raw) "Paimon" in this mod and experience the fun brought by other items.

This mod is created by MCreator.
